project.name: Compose-Clean Fixture
project.description: Jawata-owned, compile-clean fixture (JRE-only) for the parity-GATED plan lifecycle tests (Sprint 18: refactoring apply_plan / inspect_plan / undo_plan). Holds ONLY the compilable ComposeMethodTargets — so apply_plan's parity gate reaches a real 0/0 baseline. simple-maven can no longer serve this: post Sprint 22a P0-a the JavaBuilder fires and surfaces its deliberately-unresolvable imports (Lombok/JetBrains/JUnit) as real errors, which the absolute-0/0 gate (correctly) refuses.
